sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37298" key="e(chkonta/rxion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξηκοντάρχιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, name of an <sense id="n37298.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eyesalve,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:103" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.103</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
